title: card.rs: image_url not checked for https scheme before fetch
description: fetch_card_image calls url::Url::parse(image_url) and checks is_private_host_resolved but does NOT verify the scheme is https://. An OG tag with content="http://..." will be fetched over plaintext. More critically, content="file:///etc/passwd" parses successfully, has no host, so parsed.host_str() returns None and the SSRF guard is skipped entirely before client.get(image_url) is called (reqwest rejects file:// but the guard is still bypassed). Also, is_private_host_resolved uses port 443 for DNS lookup; an http:// URL to an internal host on port 80 still resolves to a private IP but the guard is conceptually mismatched. Fix: reject image_url unless it starts with https://.
close_reason: Fixed: fetch_card_image rejects non-https:// image URLs.
